title: eryngium glomeratum
intro: Eryngium glomeratum, also known as the cluster sea holly, is a perennial plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium glomeratum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations.
